scripts.build: esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=content-script.js --format=iife --banner:js='/* Generated — edit src/ not this file */'
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run version && zip -r gh-pr-reviewer.xpi "styles.css" "background.js" "options.js" "options.html" "icons/*" "manifest.json" "content-script.js"
